title: A Clear & Structured Halal Certification Journey
description: Our step-by-step process helps businesses achieve Indonesian Halal certification efficiently, transparently, and with full professional guidance.

step-1.title: Initial Consultation
step-1.description: Reviewing business operations, products, ingredients, and certification goals.

step-2.title: Compliance Gap Assessment
step-2.description: Identifying areas that require improvement before certification.

step-3.title: Documentation Preparation
step-3.description: Supporting businesses in preparing all required documents and records.

step-4.title: Factory Inspection & Internal Review
step-4.description: Evaluating production systems and operational Halal readiness.

step-5.title: Certification Submission
step-5.description: Submitting documentation for official certification review.

step-6.title: Audit Coordination & Corrective Actions
step-6.description: Assisting businesses during inspections and corrective action processes.

step-7.title: Certification Completion
step-7.description: Finalizing certification issuance after successful approval.
